title: dryopteris horizontalis
intro: Dryopteris horizontalis, also known as scalycap or rock cap fern, is a species of fern in the Dryopteridaceae family. It is a perennial plant that grows in clusters and has fronds with pinnae that resemble a scaly cap. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris horizontalis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal use.
